|desc={{p|Mudsdale}} is Hapu's first known Pokémon. It was first used to rescue {{adv|Sun}} from a group of {{pkmn2|wild}} {{p|Crabrawler}} at the [[Seafolk Village]] before defeating the Crabrawler's leader, a {{p|Crabominable}}. Later, it battled an {{tc|Aether Foundation Employee}}'s {{p|Blacephalon}} on [[Mount Lanakila]] and won using a [[Z-Move]].}}
